text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While eating in the cafeteria, I hear a
conversation between three students conducting
what appears to be a study session.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...Let us begin. I don't mean to boast, but when it
comes to classical literature, I am confident in my
teaching abilities.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
My deepest thanks! The president of the
disciplinary committee can't be failing her tests!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the help too. I'm not great at essay
questions... They take me ages.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Let us begin by reading the original
text. I shall ask questions based on the text
afterward. Are we all ready?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ready when you are! I'll nail any question you
throw at me!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Mmhm. I hope I get a good grade.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Ahem. I shall now start reading the passage aloud. "The Hunting of the Nue" by Minamoto no Yorimasa, from The Tale of the Heike...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
"Now, Minamoto no Yorimasa descended in the
fifth generation from Yorimitsu, the governor of
Settsu. His grandfather was Yoritsuna, governor
of Mikawa..."

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
"The greatest of all his exploits... to have a mount
warrior guard, and among those of the Genji and
Heike, the choice, so the story goes..."

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...My apologies. We should start on a simpler
level, with the modern translation.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
"Many a year ago, a yokai known as a nue would
wreak havoc on all, night after night."

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
"The reigning emperor ordered a warrior named
Yorimasa to slay it. And the secret strategy
Yorimasa devised to slay it was—"

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...I know! I bet he lured it with food and then
killed it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Wrong.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Really? Huh.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I must make it clear that this is not a game in
which you guess what happens next. In fact, I
haven't even asked any questions ye—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh, oh! I know! Pick me, pick me!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Go ahead. What is it that you "know"?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'll bet... he never even slayed it at all!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huh? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yorimasa and the nue clash, head-to-head! They
fight fair-and-square, throwing themselves into it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
They continue to fight, day and night, until
something blossoms between them... A peculiar
kinship!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So they promise to train real hard and then fight
again someday... before parting ways!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And then Yorimasa spends his days fighting yokai
until... One day! He's surrounded by the Four
Yokai Kings! It's a life-or-death situation!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But then! A single shadow slices through the dark
clouds! Who could it be?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
"I believe I said... I would be the one to defeat
you!" That's right! It's the nue!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hooo, talk about intense! Yesterday's enemy
ends up today's friend! A friendship that blossoms
through battle!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: The Tale of the Heike is all about battles with lotsa warriors, right?! I'll bet that's what happens!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...What a touching story. That's amazing,
Bamboo. You've got the story all figured out.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh heh! I'm gaining some real confidence in
this subject! I might even aim for a perfect score
on the next test!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo... While I must admit that I hold your
storytelling abilities in high regard...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Unfortunately, The Tale of the Heike is not that kind of story.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like many obstacles are going to hinder
the progress of their test studies...
